positive: An adorable, stylized cartoon depiction of various magical forest animals (fox, owl, rabbit) gathered around a picnic basket filled with glowing berries. The artwork should have a soft, storybook quality, thick outlines, and a pastel color scheme. Disney storybook illustration style.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, hyperrealism, grunge, scary, violent
